label: Cloud (transcription / ASR)
note: Language support varies by the active cloud transcription provider (Zhipu / Deepgram / AssemblyAI / OpenRouter). See app/language_map.py for the authoritative per-model language list. All currently-configured languages (zh/en/fr/de/es/it/hu) are supported by every cloud ASR provider. The `language_hint` field is optional -- leave empty for auto-detect (recommended for this bidirectional pipeline).

fields.label: Language hint (optional)
fields.help: Leave empty for auto-detect (recommended -- this is a bidirectional pipeline, so locking to one language will misdetect the other).
